'''鈭歵-sh-h-zh''' ('''katashezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tiddle|tiddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tiddle|tiddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-sh-h-zh
|-
! Lemma
| katashezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitashezhoko|thitashezhoko]] || [[word:jitashezhoko|jitashezhoko]] || [[word:shitashezhoko|shitashezhoko]] || [[word:kitashezhoko|kitashezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotashezhoko|thotashezhoko]] || [[word:jotashezhoko|jotashezhoko]] || [[word:shotashezhoko|shotashezhoko]] || [[word:kotashezhoko|kotashezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tashezhoko|th忙tashezhoko]] || [[word:j忙tashezhoko|j忙tashezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙tashezhoko|sh忙tashezhoko]] || [[word:k忙tashezhoko|k忙tashezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-
